author: titan
description: ACT-R episodic recall (arch §12.3, PLAN_synthesis_engine_Phase2.md §2C.a, D-P2-1 algorithm-encoded). Composite-ranked merge of three retrieval sources over the conversation fork: (1) recency window via FORK_READ (last 168h, 50 most recent), (2) semantic top-50 via SEARCH against the caller-pre-embedded query (D-P2-3 caller-pre-embeds via $query_embedding), (3) thread continuity via CROSS_REF on the caller's pivot TX ($current_chat_tx, via_field=parent_chat_tx). The action's weights override composite_score's defaults; Maker tunes ranking end-to-end by editing this JSON + re-signing. Engine consumer = synthesis_worker EngineRecall (PLAN §2D). Falls through to no-action when ALL three sources are empty (engine recall fallback path).
